llmCriteria.prompt: Evaluate whether the agent sounds like a natural restaurant host rather than a robotic form-filler. Check these observable behaviors: (1) The agent acknowledges or reacts to what the user said before moving to the next question — e.g., 'Great choice!' or 'Wonderful' — rather than immediately jumping to the next prompt with no transition. (2) The agent uses natural phrasing, not bare single-word prompts like 'Date?' or 'Name?'. PASS if the agent shows these behaviors in the majority of its turns. A single turn that is slightly less warm does NOT warrant a FAIL. FAIL only if the agent is consistently terse, mechanical, or shows no acknowledgment across multiple consecutive turns.
